brand_identity.name: MWA Industries
brand_identity.tagline: Precision Engineering. Heavy Fabrication. Global Standards.

usage_rules.h1: font-oswald font-bold text-5xl md:text-7xl uppercase tracking-tight leading-none
usage_rules.h2: font-oswald font-medium text-3xl md:text-5xl uppercase tracking-tight
usage_rules.h3: font-oswald font-medium text-2xl md:text-3xl uppercase tracking-normal
usage_rules.label: font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400

grid_system.bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-safety-yellow text-black font-oswald uppercase font-bold px-8 py-4 hover:bg-white transition-colors duration-300 clip-path-slant
buttons.secondary: border border-slate-700 text-white font-oswald uppercase px-8 py-4 hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors duration-300
buttons.ghost: text-safety-yellow hover:text-white font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-widest hover:underline decoration-1 underline-offset-4

cards.base: bg-neutral-900/50 border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm p-8 hover:border-safety-yellow/50 transition-colors duration-500 group relative overflow-hidden
cards.tilt: Use 'react-tilt' or Framer Motion for 3D hover effect on cards

inputs.base: bg-black/50 border-b border-white/20 px-0 py-4 text-white placeholder:text-neutral-600 focus:border-safety-yellow focus:outline-none rounded-none transition-colors w-full font-body

navigation.base: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/10 h-20 flex items-center justify-between px-6 md:px-12

specific_effects.magnetic_button: Use framer-motion to make buttons follow cursor slightly
specific_effects.parallax_hero: Use useScroll and useTransform for y-axis movement of background images
specific_effects.count_up: Use framer-motion useSpring for smooth number counting

textures.grid: Linear gradient grid pattern 1px lines with 0.05 opacity

details.corner_accents: Add small SVG brackets or 'plus' signs at corners of cards for technical feel
details.lines: Vertical 1px lines running through the page for structural alignment

hero.alt: Welder working with sparks in dark factory

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
3. THEME: Force Dark Mode. Do not implement a light mode toggle. The brand is 'Dark Industrial'.
4. LAYOUT: Use the 'Bento Grid' strategy for the Services and Industries sections.
5. NAVIGATION: Create a sticky navbar that compresses on scroll. Include a 'Request Quote' primary button.
6. CONTACT: Implement the 'Sticky Contact Bar' for mobile (WhatsApp + Call) as requested.
7. FOOTER: Massive footer with 'MWA' logo in huge typography (opacity 10%) in the background.
8. FORMS: Use standard HTML forms styled with Tailwind (border-b only) for a minimal technical look. No boxy inputs.
9. PLACEHOLDERS: For any missing images, use a solid dark gray div with a technical icon in the center.
10. DATA: Store all content (services list, projects, team) in a `src/data` folder as JSON/JS objects to meet the 'JSON-based data' requirement.
11. ADMIN: Create a simple /admin route (mock login) to view form submissions stored in localStorage or mocked backend.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid dark colors or subtle noise.
Use 'Oswald' for all headings. Use 'Manrope' for all body text.
Primary button color is Safety Yellow (#FFD700) with Black text.
All cards must have a subtle 1px border (white/10).
Use generous padding (py-20 minimum) for all sections.
Ensure 'data-testid' is present on all interactive elements.
